name: @aily-project/lib-esp32-hash
author: ailyProject
description: ESP32哈希计算库，支持SHA1/SHA2/SHA3和PBKDF2密钥派生
description_zh_cn: ESP32哈希计算库，支持SHA1/SHA2/SHA3和PBKDF2密钥派生
description_en: ESP32 hash calculation library, supports SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 and PBKDF2 key derivation
description_zh_hk: ESP32哈希计算库，支持SHA1/SHA2/SHA3和PBKDF2密钥派生
description_ja: ESP32 ハッシュ計算ライブラリ、SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 および PBKDF2 キー導出をサポート
description_ko: ESP32 해시 계산 라이브러리, SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 및 PBKDF2 키 파생 지원
description_de: ESP32-Hash-Berechnungsbibliothek, unterstützt die Schlüsselableitung SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 und PBKDF2
description_fr: Bibliothèque de calcul de hachage ESP32, prend en charge la dérivation de clé SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 et PBKDF2
description_es: Biblioteca de cálculo hash ESP32, admite derivación de claves SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 y PBKDF2
description_pt: Biblioteca de cálculo de hash ESP32, suporta derivação de chave SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 e PBKDF2
description_ru: Библиотека расчета хэшей ESP32, поддерживает получение ключей SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 и PBKDF2.
description_ar: مكتبة حساب التجزئة ESP32، تدعم اشتقاق المفاتيح SHA1/SHA2/SHA3 وPBKDF2
